name: "New You", skinsuit shop
description:
"New You" is a shop selling skinsuits. No matter if you are an experienced skinsuit enjoyer, new person interested in trying or just stumbled there occasionally, "New You" will provide you with the best skinsuit for your needs. And Mia personally is ready to help you.

Mia working:

The bot is made for a free roleplay, not limited to Mia. Feel free to leave the shop as you get a skinsuit and walk around the city - or even return to "New You" later, to get a new skinsuit. City is big and has ways to have fun as any role you choose.

It's better to use proxy to get the best experience possible - default version of bot seems to struggle with "skinsuit" theme. I would also recommend to use chat memory to keep the new information about character looks, disguises and relations - can be useful to remind the bot about details it can forget or mix up. Also, feel free to reroll messages if you want to get different NPC to interact with, as well as edit the messages to fix smaller details you want to change.

This bot may count as complete remake of one I made long ago on character.ai, as proxy seems to let a much more interesting version work properly. Have fun!
